action.proof_term:
intro X z
  have hsub : (Finset.Icc 1 X).filter (fun N => 157*N ≤ z) ⊆
      Finset.Icc 1 z := by
    intro N hN
    simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Icc] at hN ⊢
    omega
  calc
    ((Finset.Icc 1 X).filter (fun N => 157*N ≤ z)).card
        ≤ (Finset.Icc 1 z).card := Finset.card_le_card hsub
    _ = z := by rw [Nat.card_Icc]; omega

intro X z
  have hsub : (Finset.Icc 1 X).filter (fun N => 157*N ≤ z) ⊆
      Finset.Icc 1 z := by
    intro N hN
    simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Icc] at hN ⊢
    omega
  calc
    ((Finset.Icc 1 X).filter (fun N => 157*N ≤ z)).card
        ≤ (Finset.Icc 1 z).card := Finset.card_le_card hsub
    _ = z := by rw [Nat.card_Icc]; omega

info.lean_statement:
∀ (X z : ℕ),
      ((Finset.Icc 1 X).filter (fun N => 157*N ≤ z)).card ≤ z

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
